text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle Twinkle! ☆ O power of the moon, power
my legs!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perfect. ♪ The way things are going, the
Shuka Sho's gonna be no problem at all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna find that racing magic in no time at
all...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Is it really gonna be that easy?)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: I'm winning this! I am!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer A
text_block_list.text: You're! Not! Beating! Me! GRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer B
text_block_list.text: Get away from my throne!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! The Shuka Sho's gonna be even more
intense!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Which means I've gotta step it up too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the training track and find an
intimidating Sweep Tosho waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Boooooring!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What's the deal, Familiar?! And what's our
training regimen for the week?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! Nope! That is not gonna work!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Look at this, Familiar! This is the special magic I need right now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"One: Magic to become faster than anyone! Run
while basking in the power of the setting sun! This
must be continued for a full week!"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"Two: Magic to attain perfect concentration!
Watch a whole bunch of past races and absorb
the runners' magical energy!"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And! And!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho continues explaining the "special"
magic she's written about in her notebook.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I worked any single part of it into her training
regimen, it'd probably take her a full day.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna cast all of this special magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, it looks like we'll be training nonstop
for two weeks straight. Even if I schedule some
breaks, she won't have time to do anything else...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If you know what to do, then hurry up and get
prepping. That's your job, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna master all of this magic! And then I'm
gonna take first place in the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There's no way anyone else is winning on my
watch! After all, there's no beating my racing
magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes are blazing with determination.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to turn that special magic she's
filled her notebook with into a reality, we'll have
to train all day, every day, for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure that for every day of effort we put in,
her performance at the Shuka Sho will turn out
even better.
